LAW AND MOTION 301, A R G U E D. THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - DEFENDANT JUPITER COMMUNITIES, L.L.C. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT - GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS SHIFTED THE BURDEN ON THE ISSUE OF CAUSATION AND PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED NO TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT THAT DEFENDANT KNEW OF PLAINTIFF'S ALLEGED DISABILITY PRIOR TO MAKING THE DECISION TO TERMINATE HIM. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT SHOWN THE EXISTENCE OF AN IMPLIED CONTRACT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON REPORTER: JOYCE LONG CSR# 8620
